questions.question: Look at the picture. What is the man doing?
questions.optionA: He is walking on the street
questions.optionB: He is sitting at a desk
questions.optionD: He is talking on the phone
questions.explanation: The picture shows a man walking on the street. The audio clearly describes this activity.

questions.question: Look at the picture. Where are the people?
questions.explanation: The picture shows people in a park with trees and benches visible.

questions.question: Look at the picture. What can you see?
questions.explanation: The image clearly shows a boat on the water with people on board.

questions.question: Look at the picture. What are the workers doing?
questions.explanation: The workers are clearly repairing and maintaining the roof of the building.

questions.question: Look at the picture. How many people are in the office?
questions.explanation: There are four people visible in the office environment in this picture.
